subcodes.first_line: O ye two who are firm in the Covenant! Your letter was received. Thanks be to the Most-Desired Lord that, like unto the breezes of dawn and the fragrant morn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو ثابت بر پیمان نامه رسید شکر حضرت مقصود را که مانند نسمات اسحار و نفحات
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant
